title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
summary_full: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.
summary_public: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.
